title: Comment on HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
I fully support the removal of information blocking exceptions proposed and have observed misuse.

Other information blocking techniques that are being used and must be stopped:

-leaving encounters open for weeks, months, years
-creating a duplicate patient record
-not finalizing radiology studies

Please discuss what HHS is doing to stop these behaviors.
